_note: Pane-text substring matchers for claude's permission prompts. Runtime mirror of research/fixtures/permission-prompt-classifier-fixture.json. Each scenario's `matchSubstring` is what the classifier's permissionPrompt predicate tests against; the other fields mirror the research fixture so the two stay in lockstep (sync test in claude.test.ts). Enumerated against authenticated claude 2.1.153 at product-acceptance (2026-05-28).

scenarios.promptTextSnippet: Do you want to create hello.txt?
